sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, text_value VARCHAR(255), num_value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_value, num_value) VALUES (1, 'Hello World!', 4);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_value, num_value) VALUES (2, 'AbracadabrA', 3);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_value, num_value) VALUES (3, '', 0);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_value, num_value) VALUES (4, 'Discrete Math', 7);
SELECT id, strcontains(text_value, 'A') * num_value AS result FROM test_strings WHERE num_value > 0;
SELECT AVG(num_value) AS avg_value FROM (SELECT strcontains(text_value, 'World') AS contains FROM test_strings) AS subquery WHERE contains = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE strcontains(text_value, ('Tall' * 0)) = 0;
SELECT id, SUM(num_value) FROM test_strings GROUP BY strcontains(text_value, 'A');
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE strcontains(text_value, (SELECT text_value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2)) = 1;
SELECT id, strcontains(text_value, 'e') AS position_found FROM test_strings HAVING position_found = 1 AND num_value < 5;
ALTER TABLE test_strings ADD COLUMN updated_value INTEGER;
UPDATE test_strings SET updated_value = strcontains(text_value, 'a') * num_value WHERE id = 2;
SELECT strcontains(text_value, 'D') * MAX(num_value) OVER (PARTITION BY text_value) FROM test_strings;
